title: A1 Tow
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|A-1}}
'''''A1 Tow''''' was an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifter]] group that supplied [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] during his attempt to defect to the Alliance.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
